title: Contact Us - 211info
text: Partners and Service Providers: Find contact information for our Outreach and Engagement Team here . News and Media: Find contact information for News and Media here . Call 211info’s core operating hours are Monday through Friday, 8 AM to 6 PM. Some special programs, including Child Care Referrals , Pesticide Reporting, and Resource/Foster Care Support have extended hours. During emergency incidents, 211info may expand operations beyond core hours at the request of state or local officials. When extended hours are in effect, 211info will provide updates on its website and social media. Dial 211 or 866-698-6155 TTY: dial 711 and call 866-698-6155 Some phones that use VOIP (Voice Over Internet Protocol) or Wi-Fi calling might not be able to dial 211. If that is the case, please use our toll-free number: 866-698-6155 Language interpreters are available. Please note: During times of emergency incident response, 211info’s response time may vary. Hours may also vary based on program. Need help contacting 211info? Click here for troubleshooting tips . Text or Email You can reach the 211info team by text or email, in both English and Spanish. Text your zip code to 898211, Monday through Friday, 9 AM- 5 PM Email [email protected] , response within 72 hours, during core operating hours Download the 211info app from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store . Feedback & Grievances If you have feedback or a complaint about 211info services, you may call 211 and ask to speak to a supervisor. If a supervisor is not available, please leave a voicemail. A supervisor will look into the issue and, if requested, contact you to follow-up. 211info keeps records of all requests and grievances, including the client’s name, date, nature of the grievance, and outcome.
